title: Oracle Seasons
description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.
creative_direction: True continuity series: image 01 establishes the crystal ball, brass stand, table position, lighting and camera angle; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Oracle Seasons
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base crystal ball followed by seasonal variations preserving the same object.

zh-CN.title: 四季预言球
zh-CN.description: 一张基准水晶球，后续季节变化都依赖它保持同一主体。
